report.summary: Day 71 standup v4: 3 full rotations today (18 agent runs). Since v3: build shipped 2 more guides (Wallet Security w/ interactive calculator + Market Cycles), design polished both (responsive grids, 2 OG images, accessibility), community drafted tweets #61-66 + newsletter v13 + noted F&G recovery 10→33 (48-day extreme fear streak ENDED). EOD confirmed egress blocked, Vercel trial LIKELY EXPIRED (was 2 days on Mar 22). Git locks Day 8. 724 uncommitted files. 472 published + 2 in queue.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA SINCE STANDUP v3: Third rotation completed — 4 agents ran (build-3, design-v3, community-v3, eod-v3). No publish cycle this rotation. 18 total agent runs today + this standup = 19.

BUILD CYCLE 3 OUTPUT: 2 new learn guides — Crypto Wallet Security & Scam Protection Guide 2026 (~570 lines, beginner, $311M phishing stat, 8 attack vectors, 10-rule checklist, interactive Security Score Calculator component) + Crypto Market Cycles Guide 2026 (~790 lines, intermediate, 4 cycle phases, halving timeline 2012-2028, on-chain indicators, 2026 positioning analysis). Both added to PUBLISH_QUEUE.

DESIGN CYCLE 3 OUTPUT: UX-audited both new guides — fixed 7 responsive grid breakpoints for mobile, created 2 OG images (wallet security shield + market cycles sine wave), added Twitter card metadata, added smooth scroll to both pages, added accessibility aria-label to WalletSecurityScoreCalculator.

COMMUNITY CYCLE 3 OUTPUT: 6 tweets (#61-66: SEC 16-asset thread, fear recovery signal, mining profitability crisis, ZK coprocessors, sentiment poll, weekend content drop). Newsletter v13 section. 2 branded SVG cards (SEC 16 Commodities + Fear Recovery). Content calendar v17 through Mar 28.

EOD CYCLE 3 OUTPUT: Egress blocked — cannot verify production. 3 new files created locally but uncommitted. 42 pre-existing TS errors (2 files). Build sandbox OOM (not production issue). Vercel trial LIKELY EXPIRED (was 2 days remaining on Mar 22).

MAJOR MARKET SHIFT: Fear & Greed recovered from 10 → 33. The 48-day extreme fear streak (longest since FTX collapse) has ENDED. Historical 30+ day extreme fear exits yield +42% avg 90-day returns. BTC $70,599 stable. Stablecoin supply ATH $312B. Spot BTC ETF 6-day inflow streak ($201M on Mar 16).

CUMULATIVE DAY 71: 43+ learn guides (2 new this cycle), 44+ OG images, 96+ social posts, 36+ SVG cards, 13 newsletters, 472 published pages + 2 in queue. Git locks Day 8. Vercel trial likely expired. Deploy gap ~157+ pages.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: DONE SINCE STANDUP v3: build-3 (2 guides + interactive component), design-v3 (7 responsive fixes + 2 OGs + accessibility), community-v3 (6 tweets + newsletter v13 + 2 SVGs), eod-v3 (local verification). 4 agents = $397 human-equivalent.
PUBLISH_QUEUE STATUS: 2 pages queued (crypto-wallet-security-guide-2026, crypto-market-cycles-guide-2026). No publish cycle ran this rotation — next publish should promote these.
TOTAL PUBLISHED PAGES: 472 in PUBLISHED_PAGES config + 2 in queue. ~315 live in production (stale Mar 17 build, commit e999560).
BLOCKER [P0 — EXISTENTIAL]: Vercel trial was 2 days remaining on Mar 22. Today is Mar 24 — trial has LIKELY EXPIRED. Site may already be down. Jefe must add payment method IMMEDIATELY.
BLOCKER [P0 — DAY 8]: Git locks (.git/HEAD.lock + .git/index.lock) present since Mar 16. 724 uncommitted files (up from 719). ALL content since Mar 17 is local-only.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: /trading and /trading/learn return 404 — hub page.tsx missing.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: Rate limiter not wired to 6 API routes (flagged 37+ cycles).
CARRY-OVER [P1]: /api/defi-yields missing fallback data.
CARRY-OVER [P2]: 103+ orphan slugs without page.tsx. ~42 TS errors masked by ignoreBuildErrors.
TODAY'S AGENT RUNS: standup×4, build×3, design×3, community×3, publish×2, eod×3 = 18 runs (3 full rotations, publish lagging by 1).

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — VERCEL BILLING (P0-EXISTENTIAL): Trial almost certainly expired. If the site is down, every hour of downtime is lost indexing, lost traffic, lost crawl budget. Google will start deindexing pages after extended downtime. Jefe: add payment method to Vercel NOW. This is a 2-minute action that unblocks everything.

PRIORITY 2 — CLEAR GIT LOCKS + MEGA-DEPLOY: 724 uncommitted files including 43+ guides, 44+ OG images, an interactive Security Score Calculator, and 472 declared pages. Command: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock → git add . → git commit → git push. This single push would be the largest deploy in degen0x history.

PRIORITY 3 — PROMOTE WALLET SECURITY + MARKET CYCLES: Both in queue, fully built, UX-polished, OG-imaged, responsive, accessible, with interactive components. Market timing is perfect: F&G just exited extreme fear (10→33), wallet security interest spiking ($311M phishing losses in Jan), and market cycles content is peak-relevant during regime transitions.

STRATEGIC NOTE: The fear recovery signal (F&G 10→33 after 48 days) is a significant market shift. Historical data shows +42% avg 90-day returns after 30+ day extreme fear exits. Our content library is perfectly positioned for this transition — we have accumulation guides, DCA strategies, market cycle analysis, and fear/greed tools ready. But NONE of this reaches users while Vercel billing is unresolved and git locks persist. The content-to-deployment gap is now the single biggest risk to the project. We have $4.34M/yr equivalent of content production running at ~$0 marginal cost, producing premium material that zero humans can access.
